intro: Loewia thomasii, also known as Thomas' Loewia, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in soothing digestive issues and reducing the risk of infections. The bioactive constituents of Loewia thomasii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
